summary: Iteration 55 - Complete testing of Outbound Lead Machine, Projects, Contracts, Dashboard, Billing, Legal, and Monitoring views. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified successfully.
seed_data_creation: Created test leads via discover form and bulk import API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified the complete Outbound Lead Machine frontend+backend pipeline. Key findings: 1) Login 2-step flow works (email -> role choice -> password -> admin panel). 2) Dashboard shows correct stats (71 leads, 27 bookings, 3 chats). 3) Outbound Lead Machine has 31 leads with 9.7% conversion rate, pipeline stages display correctly, discover form creates leads, filter buttons work, lead detail view shows all info (score, legal status, fit products, analysis, timeline). 4) Projects view shows 7 projects with section editing and Build-Handover generation. 5) Contracts view shows 43 contracts with appendices and legal modules. 6) Billing, Legal, and Monitoring views all load correctly. DeepSeek LLM is MOCKED via Emergent GPT-5.2 fallback.
